name: OneMode SecurePay Audit
description: "F:\Jadx" check this out. this is a full app, mostly like ours...i need you to deeply audit this and compare to us...it has many services, features and things...compare and list them all out. report only. deeply audit our codebase and it too.

goal.answer: Deeply audit the decompiled OneMode Android app (com.android.onemode, v8.5) and compare it feature-by-feature against the complete SecurePay stack (customer-app, agent-app, dealer-dashboard, backend API). Produce a comprehensive Markdown report (AUDIT_REPORT.md) with structured comparison tables and a prioritized gap analysis.

criteria.answer:
AUDIT_REPORT.md exists in the project root and is >500 lines (verified via `ls AUDIT_REPORT.md && wc -l AUDIT_REPORT.md`)
Report contains all required sections: Executive Summary, OneMode Architecture, SecurePay Architecture, Feature Comparison (Android / Backend / Dashboard / Agent), Security & Anti-Tamper Comparison, Prioritized Gap Analysis, Recommendations
Feature comparison includes side-by-side tables for each layer (Activities, Services, Receivers, Permissions, Device Policies, Networking, Storage, Dashboard UI, Agent Workflows)
Gap analysis lists at least 10 concrete, prioritized gaps with rationale
Report is grounded in actual source inspection, not assumptions

constraints.answer: Report only — no code changes to SecurePay, Audit must inspect actual files from both codebases, not just manifests, Focus on observable features, not speculative internals of OneMode

assumptions.answer: OneMode is represented solely by the Jadx-decompiled APK at F:\Jadx (no backend source available); SecurePay's authoritative source is the current working directory at /mnt/f/SecurePay; The user wants a single Markdown document, not multiple files; Gap priorities will be judged by: security impact, customer-experience risk, and implementation effort

phases.name: Deep Audit & Report
phases.goal: Inspect both codebases, compare features across all layers, and write AUDIT_REPORT.md
phases.description: Perform a targeted deep-read of OneMode's decompiled source (manifest, services, receivers, activities, utils, room DB, retrofit API, FCM, device policies) and SecurePay's full stack (customer-app Kotlin sources, agent-app, dealer-dashboard SvelteKit routes + components, backend API routes, schema.sql). Synthesize findings into a comprehensive Markdown report with structured comparison tables and a prioritized gap analysis.

steps.description: Audit OneMode Android app: read manifest, list all activities/services/receivers/permissions, inspect key service classes (ShutDownService, LocationForegroundService, YourForegroundService, UpdateAppService, AntiAppService, SendLocationPhotoService), inspect FCM service, device admin receiver, key activities (Kiosk, AntiTheft, CameraPreview, SimTracking), and Room/Retrofit API patterns

verification.command: ls AUDIT_REPORT.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'report not yet created'

steps.description: Audit SecurePay stack: inspect customer-app Kotlin sources (admin/, worker/, ui/, data/), agent-app structure, dealer-dashboard routes + API, backend schema and server routes, GitHub Actions, provisioning scripts

verification.command: ls AUDIT_REPORT.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'report not yet created'

steps.summary: Produced two comprehensive audit documents for SecurePay: (1) securepay_android_audit.md (267 lines) covering customer-app activities, services, workers, receivers, permissions, device policies, data layer, UI screens, security features, and agent-app workflow; (2) securepay_backend_audit.md (320 lines) covering database schema (9 tables), 28 API endpoints, auth middleware (HMAC + JWT), dashboard pages, data flow, and CI/CD workflows.

steps.description: Write AUDIT_REPORT.md: Executive Summary, OneMode & SecurePay architecture overviews, per-layer comparison tables (Activities, Services, Receivers, Permissions, Device Policies, Networking, Data Storage, Backend API, Dashboard, Agent), Security & Anti-Tamper comparison, Gap Analysis (H/M/L priorities), Recommendations

verification.command: test -f AUDIT_REPORT.md && wc -l AUDIT_REPORT.md | awk '{print $1}' | xargs -I {} sh -c '[ {} -ge 500 ]'

goal: Deeply audit the decompiled OneMode Android app (com.android.onemode, v8.5) and compare it feature-by-feature against the complete SecurePay stack (customer-app, agent-app, dealer-dashboard, backend API). Produce a comprehensive Markdown report (AUDIT_REPORT.md) with structured comparison tables and a prioritized gap analysis.
